chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Cr. Jail Appeal No.S-71 of 2025. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For hearing of main case. 16.03.2026. Mr. Muhammad Saad Saeed Qureshi, Advocate for Appellant. Mr. Khalid Hussain Lakho, Deputy Prosecutor General for the State alongwith ASP Shakeel Baig from Central Prison, Hyderabad. ***************************************** ASP Shakeel Baig from Central Prison, Hyderabad, is present in Court and submits that the appellant is presently confined in jail on account of non- payment of Daman amount of Rs.40,000/- and fine of Rs.10,000/-, totaling Rs.50,000/- (Rupees Fifty Thousand only) which are going to be paid by a lady philanthropist, namely Raheela Magsi, and Mr. Abdul Samee Shaikh respectively, and upon payment of the said amounts, the appellant shall be released from jail. Order accordingly. The ASP further informs that the appellant has expressed that he does not wish to press the instant Criminal Jail Appeal on merits if he is released in view of the above arrangement. Since the appellant does not intend to contest the instant Criminal Jail Appeal on merits, the same has become infructuous and is disposed of accordingly, subject to payment of the aforesaid amount. Let a copy of this order be communicated to the Jail Superintendent for compliance. JUDGE Ali.
